description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI that runs on pushes to main, deploy-* branches, and tags matching v*.*.*. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for robotoff-org and robotoff-net environments. For each environment, set specific variables, wait for a container build workflow, clone the repository, set environment variables, create Docker volumes, start services, check services are up, run health tests, and perform cleanup.
